articles.title: Analysts Eye 33% Plunge in Cardano Price, Is Now the Time to Short ADA?
articles.description: On Monday, Cardano (ADA) recovered to $0.3484, rebounding almost 11% after falling to $0.3147 just three days before. Nevertheless, as Cardano fights to keep up its upward pace, this surge is rapidly diminishing. ADA is currently close to the crucial $0.3544 mark, having gained 4.55% the previous day.
